Found 1 error:

Error: Dynamic gating directive is not a valid JavaScript identifier

Found 'use memo if(true)'.

  2 |
  3 | function Foo() {
> 4 |   'use memo if(true)';
    |   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ Dynamic gating directive is not a valid JavaScript identifier
  5 |   return <div>hello world</div>;
